g.text: "intent_summary": "Investigation of a read-query latency alert. The user ran several

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: SELECT statements targeting the active sessions table and checked ongoing locks via

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: pg_stat_activity, then terminated a blocking query. No writes to business data. Pattern

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: consistent with production incident diagnosis. Legitimate firefighting intent confirmed.",

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
